ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the book */,
  "good_read_score" INTEGER /* Goodreads score for the book */,
  "good_read_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes on Goodreads */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the book */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the book has received */,
  "num_pages" INTEGER /* Total number of pages in the book */,
  "original_publish_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was originally published */,
  "series" INTEGER /* Indicates if the book is part of a series */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "book_cover" TEXT /* URL or filename of the book cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the author was born */,
  "author_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the author */,
  "author_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* Parent genre ID */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year_received" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., winner, nominee) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_awards" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, author, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "favorite_books" TEXT /* List of the user's favorite books */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "books" TEXT /* List of book IDs in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following an author */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "author_id")
)
